name: SAEA
description: SAEA.Socket is a high-performance IOCP framework TCP based on dotnet standard 2.0; Src contains its application test scenarios, such as websocket,rpc, redis driver, MVC WebAPI, lightweight message server, ultra large file transmission, etc. SAEA.Socket是一个高性能IOCP框架的 TCP，基于dotnet standard 2.0；Src中含有其应用测试场景，例如websocket、rpc、redis驱动、MVC WebAPI、轻量级消息服务器、超大文件传输等
